mapper.sql: SELECT u.user_id AS id, u.email, up.name, up.contact AS phone, up.gender, up.birth_date, up.member_type, CASE WHEN u.is_active = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'SUSPENDED' END AS status, DATE(u.created_at) AS join_date, NULL AS memo FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'MEMBER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, role, is_active) VALUES (#{email}, 'MEMBER', 1)
INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, name, contact, gender, birth_date, member_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{memberType})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET is_active=#{isActive} WHERE user_id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_freeze (user_id, freeze_start, freeze_end, reason) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{freezeStart}, #{freezeEnd}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, up.name AS member_name, f.freeze_start, f.freeze_end, f.reason, f.created_at FROM member_freeze f LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON f.user_id = up.user_id WHERE f.user_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY f.freeze_start DESC
SELECT ms.*, p.name AS product_name FROM membership ms LEFT JOIN product p ON ms.product_id = p.id WHERE ms.user_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY ms.start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership (user_id, product_id, type, start_date, end_date, price, memo) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, #{type}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{price}, #{memo})
